reasoning: The question asks if there will be more than 10 times as many ACLED 'Riots' in Vietnam in the 30 days prior to March 8, 2026 as compared to the baseline (which is currently 1.000, implying exactly 0 riots over the past 360 days). To resolve YES, there would need to be at least 11 recorded riots in Vietnam during February/early March 2026. Given Vietnam's strict authoritarian control and lack of any recent news regarding mass protests or civil unrest, an explosion of 11 violence-involved riots in a single month would represent a massive, unprecedented crisis. Multiple web searches for protests, riots, or any unrest in Vietnam in 2025 and 2026 returned no evidence of such events occurring. Therefore, the probability of reaching this high threshold is exceptionally low.
